official_weather.dashboard.title: Household Weather
official_weather.dashboard.subtitle: Default household weather
official_weather.config.provider.title: Weather Source
official_weather.config.provider.descrip: MET Norway is used by default without an API key, and optional source settings for OpenWeather and WeatherAPI are ready when the user provides their own keys.
MET Norway is the default source. OpenWeather and WeatherAPI require the user to provide their own API key.
The same weather device reuses the latest successful snapshot while the cache is still valid.
Prevents external weather providers from blocking the refresh chain for too long.
MET Norway requires a clear User-Agent header.
Once OpenWeather is selected, this key is used directly for weather requests.
Once WeatherAPI is selected, this key is used directly for weather requests.
official_weather.config.binding.title: Region Binding
official_weather.config.binding.descript: Each weather device binds to a region source. The default instance follows the household coordinate. Extra instances first load the available region providers, then load province, city, and district options from the selected provider.
official_weather.config.binding.fields.b: Default household weather reads the household coordinate directly. Extra weather instances should bind to a region node.
official_weather.config.binding.fields.p: For example: builtin.cn-mainland or a third-party provider code
This list is loaded dynamically from the region providers available to the current household. Newly installed region packs appear here automatically.
official_weather.config.binding.fields.r: This is the manual fallback for raw region codes. When using the built-in catalog, selecting a district is usually enough.
official_weather.config.binding.fields.p: Switch to the built-in mainland China catalog directly. If a third-party region provider is added later, switch back to manual mode.
Select a region provider first, then choose a province from that provider's catalog.
official_weather.config.binding.fields.c: The city list refreshes automatically based on the selected provider and province.
official_weather.config.binding.fields.d: Weather lookup ultimately uses the district node. The district list reloads automatically after the city changes.
